case_title: TERESA V. FIELDS VS. NAJI TRUFANT

docket_entries.description: AFFIDAVIT OF CANCELLED SERVICE (IFP: $0.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIELDS, TERESA V. AS TO DEFENDANT TRUFANT, NAJI
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (IFP: $0.00) SERVED AUG-10-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRUFANT, NAJI

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FIELDS, TERESA V. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRUFANT, NAJI $300.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300.00, DEFENDANT PROVIDED SPECIFIC TESTIMONY ABOUT THE COST OF REPAIRING THE BROKEN SINK AND DEFENDANT THEREFORE MAY RETAIN THAT AMOUNT, BUT DEFENDANT DID NOT OTHERWISE PROVIDE SUFFICIENT DETAIL OR EVIDENCE TO DEMONSTRATE A REASONABLE COST OF REPAIRING THE DAMAGE SHE ALLEGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-12-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: COPY OF NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR MAILED TO PLAINTIFF ON 11/02/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FIELDS, TERESA V. ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-12-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-12-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF TERESA V. FIELDS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NAJI TRUFANT IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT TRUFANT, NAJI

NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT TRUFANT, NAJI
